name: Robin DLX Spot
comment: Robin® DLX Spot: The ROBIN® DLX Spot uses a unique new RGBW LED light source giving colour outputs brighter than a 1200 Watt discharge unit, but with an average very eco-friendly power consumption of only 250 Watts.
